title: indigofera ovata
intro: Indigofera ovata, also known as the spreading indigo or desert indigo, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Indigofera ovata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Indigofera ovata is often prepared as a tincture or infused in water to be consumed as a tea, and it is also used as a topical application for skin issues and injuries.
